# contentful_locale (Resource)

Manages a Contentful Locale.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `code` (String) Locale code (for example, en-US).
- `locale_id` (String) ID of the locale.
- `name` (String) Name of the locale.
- `space_id` (String) ID of the space containing the locale.

### Optional

- `content_delivery_api` (Boolean) Whether this locale is enabled for the Content Delivery API.
- `content_management_api` (Boolean) Whether this locale is enabled for the Content Management API.
- `fallback_code` (String) Fallback locale code.
- `optional` (Boolean) Whether this locale is optional for entries.

### Read-Only

- `default` (Boolean) Whether this locale is the default locale.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
